mechanics.excerpt: BLOODNAMES Clan warrior, Bloodname is everything: Without Bloodname, warrior has no place the breeding program and barred from the higher positions Clan society: Only Bloodnamed warriors can serve on Clan Council or the Grand Council of all the Clans aspire t0 lead their Clan as Its Khan Loremaster: Bloodnames originated with Nicholas Kerensky; wno decreed that only the descendants of the eight hundred warriors who accompanied him into exile ad formed the Clans would be allowed t0 use surnames_ He also decreed that no more than twenty-five people could nold any given Bloodname at one time; net bearers would earn available Bloodnames through series of ritual battles_ collectively called the Trial of Bloodright: Whenever Bloodnamed warrior dies; Trial of Bloodright iS held t0 determine the name' new bearer.
